goal: Ensure fixture evaluation has an explicit path for running an agent command in an isolated worktree before executing the fixture verification commands.
tests: cargo run --quiet --bin yoyo -- eval fixtures attempt --suite local-smoke --task fixture-agent-attempt-eval --agent-command 'true' --dry-run
hidden_failure_mode: The benchmark suite can only run local deterministic checks, so harness improvements cannot be evaluated through a reproducible agent-attempt workflow.
